mapper.select: select org_id, org_name, org_code, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, package_type, expire_time, del_flag, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from mem_organization where org_id = #{orgId} and del_flag = '0'

select org_id, org_name, org_code, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, package_type, expire_time, del_flag, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from mem_organization where org_code = #{orgCode} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into mem_organization (org_name, org_code, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, package_type, expire_time, del_flag, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{orgName}, #{orgCode}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{address}, #{status}, #{packageType}, #{expireTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
update mem_organization
org_name = #{orgName}, org_code = #{orgCode}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, address = #{address}, status = #{status}, package_type = #{packageType}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where org_id = #{orgId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: update mem_organization set del_flag = '2' where org_id = #{orgId}

update mem_organization set del_flag = '2' where org_id in
#{orgId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from mem_order where org_id = #{orgId} and status != 3
